what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links attachment id att-28c0b078 in the dragnet-development channel to a board item via a board:// URI.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
standouts: Target uses a board://item-156ec226 URI scheme
conventions: Uses id prefix att- for attachments
Uses a board:// URI to reference a non-file target
Breaks the convention of having explanatory body content after frontmatter
concerns: No body content or context beyond the linkage
No explanation of why this board item is attached
The referenced board item content is not present in this file
notes: A bare metadata stub that records one typed link between a channel attachment and a board item, useful only with the referenced board item.
questions: What content or topic does board://item-156ec226 represent?
Who added this attachment and why?
What does attachment_type board_items imply about the relationship?
Is this attachment generated automatically or manually?
apparent_themes: Cross-referencing channel memory to board items
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, timestamped record that a specific board item was captured as an attachment in the dragnet-development channel memory.
novelty: The target is expressed as a board:// URI rather than a file path or plain identifier, suggesting a separate board namespace.
contribution: It contributes a timestamped, typed link between a channel attachment and a board item, preserving a traceable connection in the channel memory ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record in the dragnet-development channel that links attachment att-28c0b078 of type board_items to board://item-156ec226 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was intended to record when and how a specific board item was attached to the dragnet-development channel memory.
